message.content:
Find the support page in this Next.js/FSD codebase at /Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe. Look for:
1. The support page component (likely in src/pages-layer/support/ or similar)
2. Any existing support-related widgets/features
3. The mobile header component used in new-design pages (check src/widgets/)
4. The Footer component for new-design pages
5. The authenticated-layout for understanding how mobile is handled

Return file paths and brief descriptions of what each file contains. Be thorough.

content.text: I'll search through the codebase to find these components. Let me start by exploring the structure and locating the relevant files.

content.text:
Excellent! Now I have all the information I need. Let me compile a comprehensive report.

## Summary: Support Page and Related Components in LuxFlow FE

I've completed a thorough exploration of the codebase. Here are the key files and components:

### 1. Support Page Component
- **Main Support Page:** `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe/app/(app)/support/page.tsx`
  - Client component that displays a table of user support tickets with filtering (All/Active/Archive)
  - Features ticket list with sorting by date, category, related order, description, and status
  - Includes "Raise Ticket" button linking to `/tickets/create`
  - Shows ticket count and provides empty states for guests vs authenticated users
  - Includes a full-bleed "Questions & Enquiries" section at the bottom

- **Ticket Detail Page:** `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe/app/(app)/support/[id]/page.tsx`
  - Shows individual ticket details with admin comments, status, category, attached files
  - Allows deletion and archiving of tickets
  - Provides back navigation to support list

### 2. Support-Related Widgets

- **Create Ticket Form:** `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe/src/widgets/create-ticket-form/ui/create-ticket-form.tsx`
  - Comprehensive form for creating support tickets with file upload (max 5 files, 5MB each)
  - Supports guest and authenticated user submissions
  - Form validation with zod schema
  - Category selection, description, file attachments, preferred contact methods

- **Ticket Detail Widget:** `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe/src/widgets/ticket-detail/ui/ticket-detail.tsx`
  - Reusable component for displaying ticket details
  - Shows metadata, description, attachments, and admin responses
  - Used in protected routes for authenticated users

- **Admin Ticket Detail Widget:** `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe/src/widgets/admin-ticket-detail/ui/admin-ticket-detail.tsx`
  - Admin-specific ticket management interface

- **Create Ticket Page:** `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe/app/(app)/(protected)/tickets/create/page.tsx`
  - Page wrapper for the create ticket form with back button and instructions

- **Questions & Enquiries Section:** `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe/src/shared/ui/questions-enquiries-section/ui/questions-enquiries-section.tsx`
  - Shared UI component displayed on support page for additional help/contact

### 3. Mobile Header Component (New Design)
- **Header Component:** `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe/src/widgets/header/ui/header.tsx`
  - Main header with responsive design (hidden on mobile via `lg:hidden`)
  - Desktop version: 3-column grid layout with navigation, logo, user actions
  - Mobile version: Uses MobileMenu component with sheet sidebar
  - Supports transparent header on landing page with scroll detection
  - Includes notifications dropdown and user avatar/profile menu

- **Mobile Menu Component:** `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe/src/widgets/header/ui/mobile-menu.tsx`
  - Sheet-based mobile sidebar navigation using shadcn/ui
  - Contains accordion-style About section
  - Settings links for authenticated users (Profile, Accounts, History)
  - Logout functionality
  - Footer links (Terms, Privacy Policy, Language selector)
  - CTA button "Start with a Quote"

### 4. Footer Component
- **Footer:** `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe/src/widgets/footer/ui/footer.tsx`
  - Responsive footer with contact information, social links, and navigation
  - Mobile layout (below min-[1172px]): Single column with logo on top
  - Desktop layout: 3-column grid (Contact, Logo, Navigation)
  - Social links: TikTok, Instagram, WhatsApp
  - Navigation links include: About, Our Method, Contact, Support, FAQs
  - Background images for decorative footer elements (responsive)
  - Contact details: address, phone, WhatsApp, email, hours

### 5. Authenticated Layout (Mobile Handling)
- **AuthenticatedLayout:** `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe/src/widgets/authenticated-layout/ui/authenticated-layout.tsx`
  - Main layout wrapper that detects page routes
  - NEW_DESIGN_ROUTES includes: /wallet, /profile, /my-offers, /quote-request, /buybacks, /tickets, /support, /welcome
  - For new-design routes: Uses Header component, applies new styling with background
  - Container: max-w-[1720px] with responsive padding (px-4 mobile, px-10 desktop)
  - Main content margins: my-[62px] (mobile) to py-8 (desktop)
  - Conditionally renders Footer based on route
  - Mobile responsive with proper spacing

- **AuthenticatedHeader (Legacy):** `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe/src/widgets/authenticated-header/ui/authenticated-header.tsx`
  - Used for non-new-design routes
  - Mobile menu button visible only on mobile (lg:hidden)
  - Includes sidebar context integration for mobile menu
  - Contains notifications panel and profile popover

All support-related routes use the new-design layout with the Header component, Footer, and responsive container structure suitable for mobile and desktop viewing.
